title: The Foreign Marriage Act, 1903
description: An Act to give effect to the Foreign Marriages Order in Council, 1903. WHEREAS it is expedient to give effect to the Foreign Marriages Order in Council, 1903; It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title, extent and application.
provisions.content:
1.(1) This Act may be called the Foreign Marriage Act, 1903 .
(2) It extends to the whole of [Bangladesh].
(3) It applies also to all citizens of [Bangladesh] and to all persons in the service of Government, whether citizens of [Bangladesh] or not [* * *].

provisions.title: 2. Notice of marriage intended to be solemnized.
